title: AP Power Sector AEE Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 629 Assistant Executive Engineer Posts
organization: Andhra Pradesh Energy Department / AP Power Utilities
short_info: The Andhra Pradesh Government has officially approved a new recruitment drive for Assistant Executive Engineer (AEE) posts in the AP Power Sector, offering a strong opportunity for engineering graduates seeking government jobs in the state. As per the approval issued by the Energy Department on May 15, 2026, a total of 629 AEE vacancies in Electrical, Civil, and Telecom wings will be filled through direct recruitment, while the detailed notification is awaited.

important_dates.raw: Approval Letter Date: 15-05-2026 Starting Date for Apply Online: Updated Soon Last Date for Apply Online: Updated Soon Official Notification Release: Expected Soon

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 Years Maximum Age: 42 Years Age relaxation details are expected in the detailed notification.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B.Tech in Electrical / Civil / Telecom Engineering

salary_details.details: Salary / Pay Scale: Updated Soon Allowances and service benefits will be notified in the detailed recruitment advertisement.

selection_process: The detailed selection process has not yet been released in the approval update. The official notification is expected to include complete information regarding selection stages
Written Exam / Recruitment Test: Updated Soon Document Verification: Updated Soon Final Merit / Selection: Updated Soon
how_to_apply: Visit the official AP Power Utility / recruitment website once the notification is released
Read the detailed Assistant Executive Engineer notification carefully
Select the relevant utility and discipline
Register with valid email ID and mobile number
